notes: edit_documents.rs: 5 format! error strings pushed to error_messages, joined and returned as EditDocumentsResult::Error sent to the LLM agent (per code comment 'sent to the LLM as an error'), not rendered to user UI -> telemetry_payload. control_code_parser.rs: lines 8/11 are /// doc comments inside lazy_static! macro body (extractor false positive); lines 9/12 'Regex is valid.' are .expect() -> panic_message. inline_diff.rs/local_code_editor.rs: 'Failed to save/delete file', 'Missing base content' are Result<(),String> error strings from restore_diff_base; sole caller (code_diff_view.rs:1154) sends them to log::error! while showing a separate hardcoded toast -> telemetry_payload. 'Failed to convert StandardizedPath...' (133/137) use safe_error! logging macro -> telemetry_payload. inheritance.rs: 4 UI strings (detail_text label + tooltip_text) translated. element.rs: 'Cycle suggestions' is a Text UI element -> translated; 'Should have layout line'/'Should be clamped to last possible line' are .expect() -> panic_message. tree.rs: two .expect() -> panic_message; 'Branch {branch:?}' is in fmt::Debug impl -> telemetry_payload. session_management.rs: a11y_description() strings surfaced to screen readers -> translated UI (placeholders {} {prompt} {running_command} preserved). billing_cycle_usage_rows.rs: all 5 are non-UI identifiers (HashMap grouping keys, oz agent URL, mouse_state tooltip keys) -> protocol_key. shell.rs: 212/236 log::warn! -> telemetry_payload; 'Git Bash'/'PowerShell Core' are shell-type display identifiers/proper product names kept verbatim -> protocol_key. context_menu.rs: all menu item labels incl. 'Fork' (fork AI conversation) -> translated UI. header_toolbar_item.rs: display_label() entries translated (Agent kept English per glossary; Panel -> 面板). http_client/lib.rs: 'Can't get window hostname' & 'Request type for SSE...' are .expect() -> panic_message; 'Failed to serialize JSON/url-encoded' via report_error! -> telemetry_payload; 'X-Warp-OS-Name' is an HTTP header name constant -> protocol_key. image_cache.rs: 4 strings in fmt::Display for CustomHeaderParsingError (internal error type, propagated/logged not UI) + 'Unable to parse utf8' unwrap_or fallback stored in error payload -> telemetry_payload. driver.rs: test-driver action-log records ('Recording started', 'Step started/succeeded') -> telemetry_payload; 'Error setting Ctrl-C handler' is .expect() -> panic_message.
